approvalSource: Steve approved unattended Foundation execution: keep going card-by-card, park unsafe blockers, and continue safe work. SCOPER-UI-001 is the active blocker after INTEL-THREAD-CONTEXT-001.
notes: Scope is Strategy Hub display of existing proposal-only Scoper outputs. Not approved: auto-created backlog cards, route apply workflow changes, source extraction/sync/crawl, provider/model/browser work, external writes, Drive permission mutation, credential/key rotation, paid/provider access, browser-auth, or broad private extraction.
